1.Title: Energetic Strike
1.Description: Increases the equipper's Anomaly Proficiency by <color=#2BAD00>90</color>. When the equipper is an <color=#FE437E>Ether</color> character, and comes on-field or uses a <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, they gain a buff: DMG dealt to enemies afflicted with Attribute Anomalies increases by <color=#2BAD00>20%</color>, and all Attribute Anomaly DMG they trigger increases by <color=#2BAD00>10%</color>, lasting 15s. Repeated triggers reset the duration, and the effect is removed when switching off-field.
